creator: nospam@ofloo.net
text:
When I passthrough first and then up the iavf0 interface I get this error

iavf0: Unable to send opcode CONFIG_PROMISCUOUS_MODE to PF, ASQ is not alive
iavf0: Unable to send opcode ENABLE_QUEUES to PF, ASQ is not alive
iavf0: ARQ Critical Error detected
iavf0: ASQ Critical Error detected
iavf0: WARNING: Stopping VF!
iavf0: Unable to send opcode RESET_VF to PF, ASQ is not alive
iavf0: 1<ENABLE_QUEUES> timed out

Maybe it helps?
